message:
Add SessionOrchestrator for tmux session creation (bd-2s1tp)

Implements SessionOrchestrator in internal/swarm/orchestrator.go:
- CreateSessions: creates sessions from SwarmPlan with pane splitting
- DestroySession/DestroySessions: cleanup functionality
- GetSessionPanes: pane querying
- Staggered pane creation to avoid rate limits
- Proper pane title formatting using NTM conventions
- Tiled layout application for even pane distribution

Includes comprehensive unit tests for all public methods.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
